rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... -run 'TestExecuteBeadWorkerResourceExhausted|TestWorkResourceExhausted' -count=1 && lefthook run pre-commit

The requested resource-exhaustion stop behavior is already present in the worktree:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go exits the loop on ExecuteBeadStatusResourceExhausted, emits resource.exhausted and loop.end, unclaims the bead, and prints ResourceExhaustedStopMessage.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_status.go defines ExecuteBeadStatusResourceExhausted and IsResourceExhaustedStatus.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_resource_exhausted_test.go covers the loop stop, unclaim/no-cooldown behavior, and loop.end event.
- cli/cmd/work_resource_exhausted_test.go covers the operator-visible work command message and preflight behavior.

Focused tests passed, and lefthook pre-commit passed with no staged changes required.
